prompt: A high-detail, realistic concept art in the style of Magic: The Gathering for a character named 'Sesquipedalian Avant'. A high-level scientific monster that is a hybrid of a sophisticated alien biology and advanced quantum machinery. Humanoid in silhouette but elongated, with multiple translucent limbs that seem to phase in and out of reality. Its torso is a complex core of glowing blue plasma and shifting obsidian gears. The head has no face, instead featuring a floating array of geometric lenses and floating holographic data streams. The background is a sterile, high-tech laboratory filled with warped space-time anomalies. Dramatic cinematic lighting, sharp details, intricate textures of metal, crystal, and organic fiber. Professional digital painting. Full body shot, front view, standing pose.
